content.json:
# Container Jobs Operations
Fleet health, execution history, duration, and diagnostics from `batchjobs.lifecycle.v1` records.

parameters.name: Job
parameters.label: Job
parameters.query: union (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | extend lifecycle = parse_json(Log_s) | where tostring(lifecycle.schema) == 'batchjobs.lifecycle.v1' | project value = tostring(lifecycle.job_id), label = tostring(lifecycle.job_id) | distinct value, label), (print value="no data", label="(awaiting logs)") | order by label asc

content.query:
let Lifecycle = union isfuzzy=true (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | extend lifecycle = parse_json(Log_s) | where tostring(lifecycle.schema) == 'batchjobs.lifecycle.v1' | extend job_id = tostring(lifecycle.job_id), event = tostring(lifecycle.event) | where '{Job}' == 'value::all' or job_id == '{Job}'), (print Type="ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL", TimeGenerated=now() | where 1==0);
union
(Lifecycle | summarize Count=countif(event == 'started') | extend Metric='Executions'),
(Lifecycle | summarize Count=countif(event == 'completed') | extend Metric='Succeeded'),
(Lifecycle | summarize Count=countif(event in ('failed','timed_out','lock_failed','rejected')) | extend Metric='Failed'),
(Lifecycle | summarize Count=countif(event == 'skipped_overlap') | extend Metric='Overlap skips'),
(print Metric='(awaiting logs)', Count=0)
| project Metric, Count
content.title: Fleet summary

content.query: union (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | extend lifecycle = parse_json(Log_s) | where tostring(lifecycle.schema) == 'batchjobs.lifecycle.v1' | extend job_id = tostring(lifecycle.job_id), event = tostring(lifecycle.event), event_time = todatetime(lifecycle.timestamp), duration_ms = tolong(lifecycle.duration_ms), exit_code = toint(lifecycle.exit_code), execution_id = tostring(lifecycle.execution_id) | where event in ('completed','failed','timed_out','lock_failed','rejected','skipped_overlap') | where '{Job}' == 'value::all' or job_id == '{Job}' | summarize arg_max(event_time, event, execution_id, duration_ms, exit_code) by job_id | project Job=job_id, LastRun=event_time, Status=event, Execution=execution_id, DurationMs=duration_ms, ExitCode=exit_code), (print Job="(awaiting logs)", LastRun=now(), Status="(pending)", Execution="", DurationMs=0L, ExitCode=0 | where 1==0) | order by LastRun desc
content.title: Latest status by job

content.query: union (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | extend lifecycle = parse_json(Log_s) | where tostring(lifecycle.schema) == 'batchjobs.lifecycle.v1' | extend job_id = tostring(lifecycle.job_id), event = tostring(lifecycle.event), duration_ms = tolong(lifecycle.duration_ms) | where event in ('completed','failed','timed_out') | where '{Job}' == 'value::all' or job_id == '{Job}' | summarize AverageDurationSeconds=avg(duration_ms / 1000.0), P95DurationSeconds=percentile(duration_ms / 1000.0, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), job_id), (print TimeGenerated=now(), AverageDurationSeconds=0.0, P95DurationSeconds=0.0, job_id="" | where 1==0) | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Execution duration

content.query: union (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | extend lifecycle = parse_json(Log_s) | where tostring(lifecycle.schema) == 'batchjobs.lifecycle.v1' | extend job_id = tostring(lifecycle.job_id), event = tostring(lifecycle.event), execution_id = tostring(lifecycle.execution_id), error_type = tostring(lifecycle.error_type), exit_code = toint(lifecycle.exit_code) | where event in ('failed','timed_out','lock_failed','rejected') | where '{Job}' == 'value::all' or job_id == '{Job}' | project TimeGenerated, Job=job_id, Event=event, Execution=execution_id, ExitCode=exit_code, ErrorType=error_type, Log_s), (print TimeGenerated=now(), Job="", Event="", Execution="", ExitCode=0, ErrorType="", Log_s="(awaiting logs)" | where 1==0) | order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Failures and platform errors

content.query: union (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL | where '{Job}' == 'value::all' or ContainerName_s == '{Job}' | project TimeGenerated, Job=ContainerName_s, Execution=ContainerGroupName_s, Stream=Stream_s, Message=Log_s | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 500), (print TimeGenerated=now(), Job="", Execution="", Stream="", Message="(awaiting logs)" | where 1==0)
content.title: Recent console output
